---
title: "Tree 20 - Weeping Silver Lime"
toc: false
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_trees_from_epicollect.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

![Tree 20 - Weeping Silver Lime](/assets/images/trees/tree20.jpg)

{{< include '_tree-species-info/_weeping-silver-lime.md' >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard
